title: scrophularia heterophylla
intro: Scrophularia heterophylla, also known as the figwort or woodland figwort, is a perennial plant species in the figwort family, native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Scrophularia heterophylla include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
